steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: "The part of a compound that determines the compound's color is called ___ the chromophore." The word "chromophore" is the essential complement of "called" — it's the name being assigned. No punctuation belongs between a verb and its required complement.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
called the chromophore with no punctuation. A dash, semicolon, or comma would all wrongly separate "called" from its required object.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
